text:
Steve Jobs’ daughter Eve Jobs confirmed that she’s dating British equestrian Harry Charles.

The brunette beauty made the relationship Instagram-official last Friday by congratulating her man on winning a gold medal at the2024 Olympicsin Paris.

The sweetvideoshowed Charles running out of the arena and hopping over a small fence to embrace Eve with a sweet kiss and a hug.

“Here he comes! Wow!” Eve, 26, said in the clip.

Meanwhile, Charles, 25, seemed over the moon to be reunited with his girlfriend after his win and said, “I can’t believe it” while they continued hugging for a few seconds.

“TEAM GOLD!!!!! Beyond proud of you my love !!!! 🥇,” Eve added in the caption of her post.

On his own account, Charles alsoposted a slew of photoscelebrating winning gold for show jumping as part of the British equestrian team.

Eve was included in one of the snaps that showed her holding a supportive banner along with his other friends and family members.

“A few memories from the best day of my life,” he captioned his post over the weekend. “You saw me up on the podium, but as you all know it takes a village ! Thank you, I owe you all so much 🙏❤️.”

Eve commented under the post, “love love love you !!!” to which he replied back, “@evejobs i loooove you !!”

It’s unclear how long the two have been dating. However, eagle eyed fans noticed that Eve previouslysnuck her beau into a photo dumpshared last month.

While they haven’t disclosed how their romance began, Eve and Charles both share a love of horses. The model is also a successful equestrian and show jumper.According to Horse Sport, she ranked among the top riders under 25 years old from around the world in 2019.

However, Eve recently turned her focus to strictly modeling andsigned with DNA Model Management in 2022.

She was previouslyromantically linked to Chainsmokers DJ Drew TaggartandKardashian friend Harry Hudson.

Eve is the daughter of the late Apple founder, who died in 2011, and Laurene Powell Jobs. Her siblings include brother Reed, 32, and sister Erin, 28. Steve also was the father of daughter Lisa, 46, with his ex Chrisann Brennan.
title: Steve Jobs' daughter Eve is dating Olympic equestrian Harry Charles
description: Late Apple founder Steve Jobs' daughter Eve Jobs confirmed that she's dating British equestrian and Olympic gold medalist Harry Charles.
keywords: Sports,Entertainment,Celebrity News,celebrity children,celebrity couples,celebrity dating,olympics,steve jobs,summer olympics
